race.comment: APRES (1) resumes. He showed some ability in two runs last time in, close up on debut at Kilmore before being tested in a stronger maiden in town and struggling. He's won a trial leading in for the top yard and finds a winnable race fresh. LEVRIER (13) is a 2yo gelding by Shalaa who debuts for the Matt Laurie yard. He's jumped out well, winning one, and the stable should be respected here. NOT GUILTY (5) ran a good race on debut at Werribee when beaten just a head into third. Expect improvement on that and he draws to take catching. JASMINA (10) ran quite well off a very long spell at Kilmore and should only improve off that.
